name: default
title: Default — rules.json severities, no overrides
description: Pure no-op profile that surfaces every finding at the severity declared in rules.json. Used as the programmatic default for `validateGTFSFiles(dir)` calls so unit tests, CLIs and library consumers see our richer rule severities. The HTTP upload + export gates remain on the `canonical` profile (MobilityData-aligned) so a feed accepted by MobilityData also passes our gates.
